slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width plus COMPACT white text 화상 긴급 가이드. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25 percent smaller: 아기 화상 입었을 때 white bold, 절대 하지 말아야 할 것 bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: 첫 1분이 중요합니다 · AAP 가이드라인 기준. LARGE prominent line illustration baby hand with burn injury plus warning symbol white outline on dark background, center-right area. Bottom-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 001. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ice cube with red prohibition symbol left side. Right side COMPACT white text row: 피부 혈류 감소 조직 손상 증가. Second row: SMALL ILLUSTRATION ice water with cross symbol left. Right COMPACT white: 치유 지연 통증 악화. Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding. Bottom thin white divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: 민간요법 금지 ❌. Headline COMPACT: 버터나 기름 white, 절대 바르지 마세요 red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION butter stick with red X overlay left side. Red outlined box around all rows, GENEROUS padding. No pixel values. No quotes.

Top-left red rounded label: 감염 위험 ❌. Headline COMPACT: 된장 간장 소주 white, 화상에 바르지 마세요 red #E63946. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: 냉각 후 조치 ✓. Headline COMPACT: 냉각 후 깨끗한 천으로 white, 덮어주세요 mint #2EC4B6. Mint outlined box around rows. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Full-width bright red #E63946 header bar top: white bold text 즉시 응급실 방문이 필요한 경우. LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION ambulance with emergency cross symbol white outline center. Below numbered items GENEROUS spacing, large red numbers plus white text: 1. 얼굴 손 발 생식기 화상. 2. 모든 전기 화상 심부 조직 손상 가능성. 3. 넓은 범위 화상 또는 깊은 화상. Large red rounded border around numbered items generous padding. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Headline COMPACT: 오늘 확인하고 저장하세요 white with 저장하세요 mint #2EC4B6 underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding: 출처 white small bold, then white small text lines: · UpToDate Moderate and severe thermal burns 2026, · AAP First Aid for Burns Parent FAQs 2017, · Annals of Emergency Medicine Cool Running Water 2025, · 대한간호협회 화상 가이드 2024. Thin white divider. 소아과언니 white bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray. Thin divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white. 소아과수첩 앱 · 야간 달빛병원 바로 찾기 mint #2EC4B6. No pixel values. No quotes anywhere.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
